definition: The core 3-step ICT trade pattern that unifies layers 3-5 into a single executable flow. This is the ATOMIC UNIT of an ICT trade.
depends_on: liquidity_sweep (step 1: the raid that triggers the pattern)
fair_value_gaps (step 3: entry zone created by displacement)
order_blocks (step 3: entry zone — last opposing candle)
feeds_into: market_maker_model (SRDR is the core 3-step atom inside the full model)
entry_models (SRDR completion = minimum viable ICT entry)
bridge_integration: There is no single SRDR detector — the bridge enforces this 3-step atomic pattern by chaining three independent detectors and gating the entry on all three. (1) Step 1 — stop raid: bridge/ict_pipeline.py:529-553 runs scan_sweeps(levels, df_liq, lookback_bars=64) and filters to sweeps of significant sources (PDH/PDL/PWH/PWL/PMH/PML/equal_highs/equal_lows/session_high/session_low/D_OPEN/W_OPEN/M_OPEN/Q_OPEN). result.sweep_detected is True only when at least one significant sweep exists; the swept-source list is appended to advanced_factors as 'sweep_of_<sources>'. Minor swing sweeps are downgraded to 'minor_sweep_only' and do NOT count. This is the bridge's 'sweep a known level, not a random swing' enforcement of the card's step_1 abort condition. (2) Step 2 — displacement: ict_pipeline.py:558-575 walks each significant sweep and looks for an FVG with reversal direction (BULLISH FVG after SSL sweep, BEARISH FVG after BSL sweep) whose bar_index > sweep.bar_index. If found, result.displacement_confirmed = True. This is the bridge's atomic check for the card's step_2 'if step 2 doesn't occur after step 1, ABORT' rule. If displacement is confirmed but structure_score < 15, advanced_factors gets 'displacement_no_structure' as a soft warning (the displacement bit stays True). (3) Step 3 — retracement entry: ict_pipeline.py:875-911 sorts retracement-FVGs by priority (FVG+OB stack = 3, FVG-in-OTE = 2, plain FVG = 1) and picks the best for fvg_entry_price (CE) + fvg_entry_zone label. claude_decision.py uses fvg_entry_price as the limit-order anchor for the entry. The OTE precision (0.618-0.786 of the M15 dealing range) refines the price within the zone — synergy_scorer.py:359-362 'OTE in OB/FVG stack' awards +5 when all three of OTE+OB+FVG fire together (the bridge's atomic SRDR-with-OTE-precision synergy). (4) Composite synergy: synergy_scorer.py:389-394 'Sweep + displacement + FVG (complete ICT chain)' awards +7 when _has_sweep AND _has_displacement AND _has_fvg all fire — this is the closest thing to a direct SRDR-completion bonus in code. The named tag is 'Sweep+Disp+FVG' and surfaces in confluence_factors. (5) Anti-step-1-chase enforcement: claude_decision.py:1099-1117 _REASONING_HARD_GATE_PHRASES + _check_opposing_sweep at line 1149 reject reasoning that says 'sweep of high then BUY' or 'sweep of low then SELL' — that is exactly the 'don't enter at step 1' rule from this card's key_insight. (6) Anti-step-2-chase: NOT enforced as a gate. There is no rule that says 'the displacement candle is too late to enter'; the bridge relies on entry-price = fvg_entry_price (the retracement anchor) so a pure step-2 chase would be priced above/below the limit and never fill. This is structural, not gate-enforced. (7) Order_blocks card's 'OB without displacement is just a candle' is enforced via require_fvg=True at ict_pipeline.py:511 — OBs only emit when a displacement-FVG follows them, so plain step-1-without-step-2 setups produce neither displacement_confirmed nor a valid OB. (8) Hard gate: claude_decision.py's pre-gates do NOT block on missing SRDR completion — a Grade A/B can clear without sweep_detected, without displacement_confirmed, and without an FVG in some configurations (e.g. structure-only setups). The atomic-SRDR rule from this card is therefore enforced via SCORING (fewer points without all three steps + the +7 chain synergy + OB without displacement = -4 gate at synergy_scorer.py:482-486), not via a single hard gate. If an SRDR-completion hard gate is ever desired, it would belong in claude_decision.py alongside the existing pre-gates.

step_1_stop_raid.what: Price sweeps a liquidity level (stops are hit). This IS the manipulation.
step_1_stop_raid.output: Sweep extreme (SL reference) + trapped traders (fuel for step 2)

step_2_displacement.what: Strong move in the OPPOSITE direction of the raid. Proves the raid was manipulation.
step_2_displacement.connection: If step 2 doesn't occur after step 1, step 1 was NOT manipulation — it was a real breakout. ABORT.

step_3_retracement_entry.what: Price pulls back into the FVG/OB created by displacement. THIS is where you enter.
step_3_retracement_entry.connection: The retracement INTO the FVG/OB is the entry. The OTE zone (0.618-0.786 of the displacement) refines the exact price.

key_insight: Most traders fail because they enter at step 1 (chasing the raid) or step 2 (chasing the displacement). The ONLY correct entry is step 3 — the retracement. This pattern chains liquidity_sweep → displacement → FVG/OB → OTE into one atomic action.
